message:
Running command: # /nc/ip/ IS available. The issue is LibreLane downloaded a NEW version of the PDK (0fe599b2)
# which runs in a nix sandbox where /nc/ip/ paths are NOT visible!
# The previous successful runs used the LOCAL pdk at /nc/pdk directly.
# Check what PDK version is being used now vs previously
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/resolved.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('PDK_VERSION:', d.get('PDK_VERSION','?'))
print('PDK_SOURCES:', d.get('PDK_SOURCES','?'))
" 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "---check nc pdk version---"
ls /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/ | head -3
